500 Phrases and Sayings Dingbats

with clues and answers!

500 cryptically hidden phrases and sayings, ordered by difficulty, with the easiest at the start and the fiendishly hard at the back. How many can you answer?!

Look inside!

Fun and games for the whole family!

Try our Word Search Maker!

PLAY IN OUR MONTHLY TRIVIA QUIZ LEAGUE!
Ends in
Q. Who wrote Lord of the Rings?

Grid Library for Crossword Compiler and Sympathy

Download these free blank crossword grids to add to your Crossword Compiler or Sympathy Grid Libraries to help create crossword puzzles.

Crossword Compiler grid library files are a .txt or .xml file that can be added to your own grid library under Grid > Grid Library > Add patterns from files... You can also open them directly or drag and drop the file into the Crossword compiler window.

Sympathy users can download the .syt crossword grid template file and save it to the grid library folder within the program directory

15x15 is the most popular size for cryptic or standard crosswords and 13x13 is common for "quick" crosswords. Most crossword grids will exhibit 180° rotational symmetry. There are also a number of American style crossword grids available.

Loading...
